mapper.sql: l.id, l.lot_number, l.product_name, l.quantity, l.status, COUNT(w.id) AS work_order_count, l.created_at, l.updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM lots l LEFT JOIN work_orders w ON w.lot_id = l.id GROUP BY l.id, l.lot_number, l.product_name, l.quantity, l.status, l.created_at, l.updated_at ORDER BY l.created_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT FROM lots l LEFT JOIN work_orders w ON w.lot_id = l.id WHERE l.id = #{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY l.id, l.lot_number, l.product_name, l.quantity, l.status, l.created_at, l.updated_at

SELECT FROM lots l LEFT JOIN work_orders w ON w.lot_id = l.id WHERE l.lot_number = #{lotNumber, jdbcType=VARCHAR} GROUP BY l.id, l.lot_number, l.product_name, l.quantity, l.status, l.created_at, l.updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lots ( id, lot_number, product_name, quantity, status, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{lotNumber, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{productName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{quantity, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
mapper.update: UPDATE lots SET lot_number = #{lotNumber, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, product_name = #{productName, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, quantity = #{quantity, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, status = #{status, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, updated_at = #{updatedAt, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} WHERE id = #{id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}
